_attribution: SRD 5.1, CC-BY-4.0, Wizards of the Coast

throwable_items.name: Alchemist's Fire
throwable_items.description: On a hit, the target takes 1d4 fire damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature can end this damage by using its action to make a DC 10 Dexterity check to extinguish the flames.

throwable_items.name: Acid (vial)
throwable_items.description: As an action, you can splash the contents of this vial onto a creature within 5 feet of you or throw the vial up to 20 feet, shattering it on impact. Make a ranged attack against a target.

throwable_items.name: Holy Water (flask)
throwable_items.description: As an action, you can splash the contents on a creature within 5 feet or throw it up to 20 feet. Make a ranged attack. If the target is a fiend or undead, it takes 2d6 radiant damage.

throwable_items.name: Oil (flask)
throwable_items.description: You can splash oil on a creature within 5 feet or throw it 20 feet. If the target takes fire damage before the oil dries (1 minute), it takes an additional 5 fire damage.

throwable_items.name: Ball Bearings (bag of 1,000)
throwable_items.description: As an action, you can spill these on a 10-foot square area. A creature moving through must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

throwable_items.name: Caltrops (bag of 20)
throwable_items.description: As an action, you can spread a bag of caltrops to cover a 5-foot-square area. A creature that enters the area must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or stop moving and take 1 piercing damage. Until the creature regains at least 1 hit point, its walking speed is reduced by 10 feet.

throwable_items.name: Net
throwable_items.description: A Large or smaller creature hit by a net is restrained until it is freed. A creature can use its action to make a DC 10 Strength check, freeing itself or another creature on a success. Dealing 5 slashing damage to the net (AC 10) also frees the creature.

throwable_items.name: Torch (as weapon)
throwable_items.description: If you make a melee attack with a burning torch and hit, it deals 1 fire damage.

throwable_items.name: Healer's Kit
throwable_items.description: This kit has ten uses. As an action, you can expend one use to stabilize a creature that has 0 hit points, without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

throwable_items.name: Antitoxin
throwable_items.description: A creature that drinks this gains advantage on saving throws against being poisoned for 1 hour.

throwable_items.name: Potion of Healing
throwable_items.description: You regain 2d4+2 hit points when you drink this potion.

throwable_items.name: Potion of Greater Healing
throwable_items.description: You regain 4d4+4 hit points when you drink this potion.

throwable_items.name: Potion of Superior Healing
throwable_items.description: You regain 8d4+8 hit points when you drink this potion.

throwable_items.name: Potion of Supreme Healing
throwable_items.description: You regain 10d4+20 hit points when you drink this potion.
